notes: Depends on DISC-0 (HudProperty model) — must be approved and migration applied.
Field asking_price is new — not an alias for existing list_price.
Insured status choices defined per FHA/VA/conventional/uninsured categories.
Human gate DISC-HG-1: confirm data.gov HUD REO endpoint URL before production.
Test fixtures co-located in core/tests/test_ingestion/, not core/fixtures/.

tasks.title: Extend HudProperty model with REMOVED status, asking_price, insured_status
tasks.description: Add REMOVED = 'removed' to HudProperty.Status choices, add asking_price Decimal field, add insured_status CharField with InsuredStatus choices.
subtasks: Add InsuredStatus inner class with FHA_INSURED, CONVENTIONAL, UNINSURED, VA choices

acceptance_criteria.criterion: HudProperty has insured_status field with defined choices

tasks.title: Create test fixtures and conftest.py for HUD ingestion tests
tasks.description: Create core/tests/test_ingestion/ directory with conftest.py providing mock_hud_response and existing_hud_record fixtures, plus fixture JSON data.
subtasks: Create conftest.py with mock_hud_response fixture returning sample HUD REO JSON
Create conftest.py with existing_hud_record fixture for stale-record tests
Create fixture JSON data inline or as a separate JSON file

acceptance_criteria.criterion: existing_hud_record fixture creates a record not in mock data

tasks.title: Implement ingest_hud_reo management command
tasks.description: Create core/management/commands/ingest_hud_reo.py with fetch, upsert, stale-removal, and dry-run logic.
subtasks: Implement handle() with fetch → parse → upsert → stale-removal → log pipeline
Implement dry-run mode (use fixture data, skip DB writes)
Map data.gov JSON field names to HudProperty fields

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Command runs without errors in dry-run mode

tasks.title: Write all acceptance tests
tasks.description: Create core/tests/test_ingestion/test_hud_reo.py with 5 unit tests and BDD scenarios.
